name: Schreiben für Menschen und Roboter mit Maddy Osman
episode_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Maddy Osman is the bestselling author of "Writing for Humans and Robots: The New Rules of Content Style" and CEO of The Blogsmith. Her decade-long devotion to creating engaging, accessible, and relevant content has made her an expert at content creation for enterprise B2B technology brands. She is also featured in Semrush's and BuzzSumo’s Top 100 Content Marketers and The Write Life’s 100 Best Websites for Writers.
episode_summary_rich_text:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

How do you write for SEO without sounding like a robot? Maddy Osman literally wrote the book on it! On this episode of The Syncast, we learn:

  • How great content starts by choosing the right topic (and target keywords)
  • How to develop a content strategy centered on SEO
  • Why great SEO shouldn't be impacted by Google updates and algorithm changes

‍
